summary: Frontend-only UI testing completed for Iron Miles mobile app. All 18 features tested and verified working correctly. Dashboard screen, navigation, Generate Workout flow, and all placeholder screens functioning as expected. 100% success rate.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Should use 'boxShadow' instead. Affects shadowColor, shadowOffset, shadowOpacity, shadowRadius properties.
react_native_issues.impact: No functional impact - just console warnings. Future React Native versions may require boxShadow syntax.

action_items: Optional: Update shadow* style props to boxShadow syntax to eliminate deprecation warnings (low priority, no functional impact)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, SafeAreaView)
✅ All styles use StyleSheet.create() - no CSS files
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ testID attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
✅ Expo Router navigation working correctly with file-based routing
✅ Color palette consistent throughout (dark/graphite/black with gold accents)
✅ Proper use of SafeAreaView for mobile safe areas
✅ Touch targets are appropriately sized for mobile interaction
✅ Bottom navigation has proper active states with gold highlighting

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend for this UI-only app

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - hardcoded placeholder data in driverData object in index.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a pure UI scaffolding app with no backend integration. All data is hardcoded in the frontend. The app uses Expo Router with file-based routing. Custom tab bar implementation in (tabs)/_layout.tsx. Generate Workout screen is a modal presentation. All placeholder screens (Progress Map, Workouts, Fuel) show COMING SOON text as expected. The only minor issue is deprecation warnings for shadow* props which don't affect functionality.
features_tested: ✅ Dashboard screen loads with all sections visible (header, route hero, welcome, CTA, cards, bottom nav)
✅ Header shows 'IRON MILES' title and 'Fitness Journey for Truck Drivers' subtitle
✅ Route hero section displays 'Chicago' and 'Denver' with mile shields showing '27' and '50'
✅ Generate Workout CTA button is visible and tappable
✅ Tapping Generate Workout button navigates to /generate-workout placeholder screen
✅ Generate Workout screen shows workout type options (Upper Body, Lower Body, Full Body, Stretch & Recover) and back button
✅ Back button on Generate Workout screen returns to Dashboard
✅ Current Miles card shows '+27' miles earned and progress bar
✅ Last Workout card shows 'Upper Body' and '+10 Miles'
✅ Quick Stats card shows 65 Workouts, 8,450 Steps, 720 Calories
✅ 4-tab bottom navigation with tabs: Dashboard, Progress Map, Workouts, Fuel
✅ Dashboard tab is highlighted/active by default
✅ Tapping Progress Map tab navigates to Progress Map placeholder screen
✅ Tapping Workouts tab navigates to Workouts placeholder screen
✅ Tapping Fuel tab navigates to Fuel placeholder screen
✅ Each placeholder screen shows COMING SOON text
✅ Tapping Dashboard tab returns to Dashboard from any placeholder

design_verification.theme: ✅ Dark/graphite/black background with gold accents matches Iron Miles branding
design_verification.typography: ✅ All text properly styled with appropriate font sizes and letter spacing
design_verification.spacing: ✅ Proper padding and margins throughout (16px, 12px, 8px grid)
design_verification.touch_targets: ✅ All interactive elements have adequate touch target sizes (minimum 40x40)
design_verification.navigation: ✅ Bottom tab bar has clear active states with gold highlighting
design_verification.visual_hierarchy: ✅ Clear visual hierarchy with hero section, CTA, and supporting cards
